file\"},{\"filename\":\"sdk/tenantactivitylogalerts/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts/README.md\",\"status\":\"added\",\"additions\":113,\"changes\":113,\"patch\":\"@@ -0,0 +1,113 @@\\n+# Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement client library for JavaScript\\n+\\n+This package contains an isomorphic SDK (runs both in Node.js and in browsers) for Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement client.\\n+\\n+Tenant Level Activity Log Alert Rules provides rules creation on management group level.\\n+\\n+Key links:\\n+\\n+- [Source code](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/tree/main/sdk/tenantactivitylogalerts/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts)\\n+- [Package (NPM)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@azure/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts)\\n+- [API reference documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/javascript/api/@azure/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts?view=azure-node-preview)\\n+- [Samples](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/tree/main/sdk/tenantactivitylogalerts/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts/samples)\\n+\\n+## Getting started\\n+\\n+### Currently supported environments\\n+\\n+- [LTS versions of Node.js](https://github.com/nodejs/release#release-schedule)\\n+- Latest versions of Safari, Chrome, Edge and Firefox.\\n+\\n+See our [support policy](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/SUPPORT.md) for more details.\\n+\\n+### Prerequisites\\n+\\n+- An [Azure subscription][azure_sub].\\n+\\n+### Install the `@azure/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts` package\\n+\\n+Install the Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement client library for JavaScript with `npm`:\\n+\\n+```bash\\n+npm install @azure/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts\\n+```\\n+\\n+### Create and authenticate a `TenantActivityLogAlertsManagementClient`\\n+\\n+To create a client object to access the Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement API, you will need the `endpoint` of your Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement resource and a `credential`. The Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement client can use Azure Active Directory credentials to authenticate.\\n+You can find the endpoint for your Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement resource in the [Azure Portal][azure_portal].\\n+\\n+You can authenticate with Azure Active Directory using a credential from the [@azure/identity][azure_identity] library or [an existing AAD Token](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/sdk/identity/identity/samples/AzureIdentityExamples.md#authenticating-with-a-pre-fetched-access-token).\\n+\\n+To use the [DefaultAzureCredential][defaultazurecredential] provider shown below, or other credential providers provided with the Azure SDK, please install the `@azure/identity` package:\\n+\\n+```bash\\n+npm install @azure/identity\\n+```\\n+\\n+You will also need to **register a new AAD application and grant access to Azure TenantActivityLogAlertsManagement** by assigning the suitable role to your service principal (note: roles such as `\\\"Owner\\\"` will not grant the necessary permissions).\\n+\\n+For more information about how to create an Azure AD Application check out [this guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/howto-create-service-principal-portal).\\n+\\n+Using Node.js and Node-like environments, you can use the `DefaultAzureCredential` class to authenticate the client.\\n+\\n+```ts snippet:ReadmeSampleCreateClient_Node\\n+import { TenantActivityLogAlertsManagementClient } from \\\"@azure/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts\\\";\\n+import { DefaultAzureCredential } from \\\"@azure/identity\\\";\\n+\\n+const client = new TenantActivityLogAlertsManagementClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n+```\\n+\\n+For browser environments, use the `InteractiveBrowserCredential` from the `@azure/identity` package to authenticate.\\n+\\n+```ts snippet:ReadmeSampleCreateClient_Browser\\n+import { InteractiveBrowserCredential } from \\\"@azure/identity\\\";\\n+import { TenantActivityLogAlertsManagementClient } from \\\"@azure/arm-tenantactivitylogalerts\\\";\\n+\\n+const credential = new InteractiveBrowserCredential({\\n+  tenantId: \\\"\\u003cYOUR_TENANT_ID\\u003e\\\",\\n+  clientId: \\\"\\u003cYOUR_CLIENT_ID\\u
2026-03-23T07:35:35.5381475Z ...
